fields.label: Provider Name
fields.description: Human-readable name, e.g. 'Production Minimax' or 'Dev OpenAI'.

fields.label: Provider Type
fields.description: Which LLM provider API to call. Determines the adapter used. NOTE: only 'minimax' is implemented in Slice 5 — the other options are reserved for future slices and will raise LLMError if selected until their adapter classes land. Adding a new option here requires both extending this Select AND adding a subclass + branch in frappe/friday_core/llm/provider.py.

fields.label: Active
fields.description: Only active providers can be used. Inactive providers are skipped during fallback resolution.

fields.label: API Key
fields.description: The API key for this provider. Stored encrypted at rest.

fields.label: Base URL (optional)
fields.description: Override the provider's default API endpoint. Leave blank to use the adapter default. For Minimax the adapter default is https://api.minimax.io (international OpenAI-compat endpoint); override with https://api.minimaxi.com for the China endpoint. Also useful for proxies like OpenRouter.

fields.label: Default Model
fields.description: Model to use when the Agent Profile does not specify one. E.g. MiniMax-Standard, gpt-4o, claude-3-sonnet.

fields.label: Default Temperature
fields.description: Sampling temperature. 0.0 = deterministic, 2.0 = very random. Typical range: 0.0–1.0.
